overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking through a dark forest at night, following a path that opens to a shoreline, then entering the ocean and swimming along the coast. The scene transitions from an enclosed forest trail to open water with consistent nighttime lighting.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow forest path between grassy hills and dense trees

entered.detail: Dense pine trees lining the left side of the path
Dense pine trees lining the right side of the path
Grass-covered hillside rising on the left
Grass-covered hillside rising on the right
Narrow dirt trail winding through the valley

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow forest trail enclosed by grassy hills and dense coniferous trees on both sides. The path winds through the dark valley with limited sky visibility, creating an intimate, enclosed atmosphere.

events.description: exiting enclosed forest valley into open coastal area with ocean visible on the right

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the shoreline path approaching the water's edge, moving toward the ocean

entered.detail: Dark ocean water stretching to the horizon with gentle waves
Rocky shoreline with pine trees above, forming the coast
Dark night sky visible above the ocean horizon

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up to reveal a wide coastal scene with the ocean on the right and rocky shoreline on the left. Geralt continues walking along the path as the night sky becomes fully visible above the water, transitioning from the enclosed valley to the open coast.

events.description: character enters the ocean water and begins swimming forward

agents.ego_description: Geralt swimming in the ocean along the coastline, moving through the water away from the shore

entered.detail: Rocky formations visible beneath the water surface near the shore
Distant horizon line where dark water meets the night sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt enters the ocean and begins swimming, with the water now surrounding the camera view. The rocky coastline recedes into the distance on the left while the open water stretches in all directions, creating a sense of immersion in the dark aquatic environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic forest valley into the vast openness of a nighttime ocean. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow trail enclosed by dense coniferous trees and grassy hills, where the high terrain limits the view of the sky. As the path winds forward, the forest opens up to reveal a wide coastal landscape, shifting the perspective from the enclosed valley to a rocky shoreline bordered by the expansive sea. The scene then moves from the land into the water as Geralt begins to swim, causing the coastline to recede into the distance. Finally, the camera becomes fully immersed in the dark aquatic environment with the open water stretching in all directions under the night sky.
